objective: Complete CleanMac real local functionality and localization coverage on a new branch.
exit_condition: The goal is complete when current CleanMac features use real local data instead of fake, demo, placeholder, or hardcoded sample data; incomplete localization has been replaced with resource-backed strings across supported locales with placeholder parity; relevant tests prove the behavior; swift test passes; and checkpoint plus implementation changes are committed.

phases.name: Audit fake data and incomplete localization gaps
Add failing tests for real-data and localization gaps
Implement real-data behavior and localization fixes
Verify with SwiftPM tests and build

current.focus: New goal initialized after pulling main to 1c01973 and creating codex/real-features-localization.
current.next_action: Audit the current source for placeholder/fake data paths and localization gaps before editing production code.

decisions.reason: The objective is result-driven: real features and complete localization are the explicit end state.

decisions.decision: Use a normal feature branch in the current checkout instead of creating an extra worktree.
decisions.reason: The user explicitly asked to checkout a new branch, and the working tree was clean on main before branching.
CleanMac is package-first, and prior verified workflows use SwiftPM tests and builds.
Real-data behavior and localization fixes should be proven by failing tests before production changes.
